nodes.label: OE Brand Mark SVG
nodes.summary: SVG brand mark for Open Energy Platform titled 'Consolidated Energy Cockpit'. Composed of three interlocking arc rings (blue, teal, navy) arranged in a triangular pattern, plus a navy disc and sky-blue centre dot, reproducing the OE brand identity.

nodes.label: Top-Left Blue Ring
nodes.summary: Partial arc ring at cx=142, cy=148, r=92, stroke #3b82c4 (blue), stroke-width 22. One of three interlocking rings in the OE mark.

nodes.label: Top-Right Teal Ring
nodes.summary: Partial arc ring at cx=258, cy=148, r=92, stroke #1f9b95 (teal), stroke-width 22. One of three interlocking rings in the OE mark.

nodes.label: Bottom Navy Ring
nodes.summary: Partial arc ring at cx=200, cy=252, r=92, stroke #1a3a5c (navy), stroke-width 22. One of three interlocking rings in the OE mark.

nodes.label: Centre Navy Disc
nodes.summary: Filled circle at cx=200, cy=200, r=22, fill #1a3a5c (navy). Forms the centre cluster of the mark.

nodes.label: Centre Sky-Blue Dot
nodes.summary: Small filled circle at cx=200, cy=200, r=9, fill #5fa8e8 (sky-blue). Innermost dot of the centre cluster.

nodes.label: Brand Blue #3b82c4
nodes.summary: Mid-tone blue used for the top-left ring. Part of the OE brand palette.

nodes.label: Brand Teal #1f9b95
nodes.summary: Teal/green used for the top-right ring. Part of the OE brand palette.

nodes.label: Brand Navy #1a3a5c
nodes.summary: Dark navy used for the bottom ring and centre disc. Primary dark colour in the OE brand palette.

nodes.label: Brand Sky-Blue #5fa8e8
nodes.summary: Light sky-blue used for the innermost centre dot. Accent colour in the OE brand palette.

nodes.label: Consolidated Energy Cockpit
nodes.summary: Accessible label and SVG <title> text: 'Consolidated Energy Cockpit'. Describes the mark's semantic purpose as representing the unified energy platform cockpit.
